headline: OpenAI enlists consultants to commercialize Codex code generation tool
body: OpenAI is partnering with management consultants to build out sales infrastructure for Codex, its code generation model, signaling aggressive commercialization of AI-powered development tools. For healthcare AI vendors and health system IT teams, this matters because code generation at scale could accelerate development of clinical decision support systems and EHR integrations, but also raises questions about whether third-party dependencies on closed commercial models align with healthcare's compliance and interoperability requirements. The consultant-led go-to-market approach suggests OpenAI sees significant revenue potential in enterprise software development, a sector where healthcare organizations compete for engineering talent. Health systems evaluating AI-assisted development workflows should monitor Codex pricing models and vendor lock-in implications as part of broader healthcare technology stack decisions.
